title: Visible & Outlined Waxed Blocks
description: Add an outline to ALL the waxed copper blocks in order to distinguish the waxed from the non-waxed ones more easily.
body:
Indicate / Highlight which blocks are waxed with a clean yellow outline. No more need to use the f3 menu to distinguish the waxed blocks from the non-waxed ones! ![Here are all the waxed copper blocks with their yellow outline.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0c0f5855340bda881fbfec8d6ce6673f82f8bba_0.webp)

**Got an issue or a question? → Send me a message on Discord: enigmusse** By the way, I'm also on the Modrinth and CurseForge Discord servers.

**How to use it?** 1. Copy it into the resource packs folder of your Minecraft instance. 2. Open the escape menu, click **Resource Packs**, and select **"Visible & Outlined Waxed Blocks"**!

**Compatibility Notice** The resource pack functions correctly despite the compatibility warning. Simply confirm by selecting **Yes** when prompted. To suppress this notification completely, install the mod: - [No Resource Pack Warnings (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) Without this solution, I'd need to create and upload a separate archive for nearly every minor Minecraft version — even though the textures remain unchanged — leading to unnecessary extra work.
